SEARCH
Package pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.Composite

Class Room

java.lang.Object
pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.Composite.Location
pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.Composite.Room
public class Room extends Location
Represents a specific room in a building. This class acts as a Leaf in the Composite Design Pattern. It contains the actual physical data (area, cubature, etc.) that the Visitor will use for calculations.

  • Field Summary

  • Method Details

    • accept

      public void accept(Visitor v)
      Implements the Visitor Design Pattern. This method allows the visitor to perform a concrete operation specifically defined for a Room.
      Specified by:
      accept in class Location
      Parameters:
      v - The Visitor performing an operation on this room.

    • checkArea

      public long checkArea()
      Returns:
      The area of this room.

    • checkCubature

      public long checkCubature()
      Returns:
      The cubature of this room.

    • checkLight

      public long checkLight()
      Returns:
      The lighting power in this room.

    • checkHeating

      public long checkHeating()
      Returns:
      The heating energy consumption of this room.

    • setArea

      public void setArea(long area)
      A setter used by SpringAPI
      Parameters:
      area - The area value to set.

    • setCubature

      public void setCubature(long cubature)
      A setter used by SpringAPI
      Parameters:
      cubature - The cubature value to set.

    • setLight

      public void setLight(long light)
      A setter used by SpringAPI
      Parameters:
      light - The light value to set.

    • setHeating

      public void setHeating(long heating)
      A setter used by SpringAPI
